relations.note: Defines the specific approved color applications for the typographic lockup.
Binds the mandatory exact copy to the typographic visual layout.

quotes: Agenda (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold)
approximately 40% tint of the headline color
Agenda (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold)
The letters "D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint of the headline color
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.

rules.intent: Maintain the distinct typographic signature and mnemonic treatment of the disease name (dermatomyositis) in the campaign lockup.
rules.rule_text: The campaign headline 'YOU DESERVE MORE' must be set in the Agenda font (fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold, weight.nunito_sans.800 = 800) in ALL CAPS (case.campaign.headline = all_caps), stacked as three lines in hero placements, and left-aligned. The letters 'D' (in DESERVE) and 'M' (in MORE) must be set to approximately 40% tint (opacity.campaign.headline_char_tint = 0.4) of the main headline color.

quotes: Two approved colorways: brand Gold/Sunshine or Brand Blue (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).

rules.intent: Ensure color consistency and proper contrast for the campaign mnemonic.
rules.rule_text: The campaign headline must use one of two approved colorways: brand Gold/Sunshine (color.primary.sunshine = #faa31b) or Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b). The 40% tinted letters must match the selected base hue.

effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."
Full lockup copy: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

rules.intent: Maintain clinical claim precision and trademark exactness for the LISRAYA campaign introduction.
rules.rule_text: The full headline lockup text must appear exactly as: 'YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.'
